<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Promote downstream"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/stages/{stage}/promotions/downstream"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a Promotion resource for each of a Stage's immediately
downstream Stages.
